field_group.brief: Product and instrument classification fields for a trade.
field_group.description:
One of five field-groups that compose trading::domain::trade via
rfl::Flatten<T>.  See trade_identity_field_group.json for the
rationale behind the sub-struct decomposition.

This group carries the product/instrument classification fields
(trade type, product type, instrument, asset class, netting set,
activity type, and status).

fields.name: trade_type
fields.description: Trade type code (e.g. Swap, FRA, Option).

fields.name: asset_class
fields.description: Optional asset class override (e.g. Rates, Credit, FX).

fields.name: netting_set_id
fields.description: Netting set identifier for collateral/margin grouping.

fields.name: activity_type_code
fields.description: Lifecycle activity code (e.g. New, Amendment, Novation, Termination).
